name: UBA : Bruteforce Authentication Attempts
notes: This rule detects authentication failure brute force attack (Horizontal and Vertical).
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Horizontal), BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Vertical)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Bruteforce Authentication Attempts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Horizontal), BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Vertical)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Bruteforce Authentication Attempts
